sidecar_issues.evidence: playwright.config.ts defaults NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to http://127.0.0.1:8000 and only starts pnpm exec next dev on 127.0.0.1:3000. fap-web has no repo-wide mock/backend API startup script; prior local run logged ECONNREFUSED for 127.0.0.1:8000. .github/workflows/ci.yml does not provision fap-api or a mock API.
sidecar_issues.failure_summary: Full e2e requires a stable backend/mock API on 127.0.0.1:8000 or an explicit NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL target, which PR-AUDIT-FE-01 does not provide and should not fake inside lint/CI-baseline scope.
sidecar_issues.why_external_to_current_pr: The current PR diff is limited to behavior-equivalent lint fixes, CI validation gates, contract typing, and PR train metadata; it does not modify Playwright API origin resolution, backend provisioning, article content APIs, Big Five runtime APIs, or payment wait-flow runtime logic.
sidecar_issues.impact_on_current_pr: The current PR removes the guaranteed ECONNREFUSED e2e hard-fail from CI and keeps lint/typecheck/build/contract/a11y as required local and GitHub gates.
sidecar_issues.follow_up_recommendation: Create a separate e2e environment readiness PR to provision a stable backend/mock API for pnpm test:e2e before making it a required CI gate.

SEO-CORE-TEST-DETAIL-500-INCIDENT-01.title: SEO-CORE-TEST-DETAIL-500-INCIDENT-01 restore core test detail availability

dependency.evidence: This is the root task and has no dependencies.

incident_reproduction.evidence: Exact origin/main 5ae48bdda2ccd0e63bee9ca30de395ccd8ddd26b built successfully, but its production server returned HTTP 500 for the core MBTI detail route with DYNAMIC_SERVER_USAGE while direct backend catalog and lookup reads returned HTTP 200. The SSG route consumed request-scoped next/headers during its page-body rollout decision.

focused_contracts.evidence: Focused route, rollout, landing, and static-params contracts pass 36/36, including the exact twelve EN/ZH core URL matrix.

required_local_checks.evidence: Focused route matrix and rollout contracts passed 36/36; pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, full pnpm test:contract (768 files / 4453 tests), production build (206/206), YAML/JSON validation, exact changed-file scope validation, and git diff --check all passed. A local production server returned HTTP 200 with visible H1/body, self-canonical, index/follow robots, hreflang, and take CTA for all twelve EN/ZH URLs across three rounds (36/36).

github_required_checks.evidence: PR has not been opened.

history.summary: Started from exact fap-web origin/main 5ae48bdda2ccd0e63bee9ca30de395ccd8ddd26b in an isolated worktree. Direct backend catalog and lookup authority returned HTTP 200. The unmodified production build reproduced the shared HTTP 500 with DYNAMIC_SERVER_USAGE because the statically generated test detail page called request-scoped headers() for rollout identity. Removed that dynamic API from the static landing only, preserved request-specific rollout enforcement on the take route, and added the exact twelve-route metadata/SSR/CTA regression matrix. No CMS, publication, indexability, sitemap, llms, Search Channel, deploy, or production mutation occurred.

All Task 1 manifest checks passed: focused route/rollout/landing/static-params contracts 36/36, lint, typecheck, full contracts 768 files / 4453 tests, production build 206/206, YAML/JSON validation, scope validation, and diff checks. The built production server passed the exact twelve EN/ZH URL matrix for status, visible body, canonical, robots, hreflang, and CTA in three bounded rounds (36/36). No production or authority-layer mutation occurred.
